change the content to fit the issue

### related areas
- Manage Plan

### what
need a function in CourseRegistrationSystem to return the credit limit

### why
controllers need a way to check if an action will violate the students credit limit
because in manage plan, we want to show a warning immediately if adding a section to the plan will exceed the limit, without having to make the user submit the plan and then reject it after that
